title: re-enable image-tools validation in tests
body: https://github.com/projectatomic/skopeo/pull/313/commits/55144fd12baf377ba767cc9a1e957d506b4f87c8 commented out oci layout validation because the image-tools library isn't yet updated to the image-spec RC5 pending https://github.com/opencontainers/image-tools/pull/144. Revert that once image-tools is updated for image-spec RC5.
